headline: Assessing Realty Income (O) Valuation After Strong Q1, Higher AFFO Guidance And Ongoing Monthly Dividends
summary: Realty Income (O) just packed several key moves into a short window, combining first quarter results, higher investment and AFFO guidance, a 671st monthly dividend, and fresh equity issuance and buybacks. See our latest analysis for Realty Income. Despite the recent earnings beat, higher AFFO guidance, follow on equity offerings and fresh buybacks, Realty Income's share price has drifted.
